star_1.text: Game used to be great,the BEST, but for a long time now it has had an issue that has not been addtessd, & i'd say has been purposely ignored. Often, after landing, especially when taking a mission, the planes simply will NOT take off again. Full throttle, brakes off, it just sits there. This is even more true for the planes thar are won, or purchased later in the game. Makes the game unplayable, often requiring retracting landing gear so you explode then reset. No longer a great game, imho.

I really like the game. However, the twin engine plane will take off, fly beautifully and land like a dream and loads passengers then stays right there on the runway and will not budge. I have to start all over just to have it do the same thing. Engines at full power, brakes off and no movement at all. Frustrating is the only word to describe it.

One of the better flight simulation games out there for sure. Controls are relatively basic, easy to pick up but landings can throw you a curve ball every once in a while. The free flying modes are actually quite relaxing though. EDIT: Finally had to uninstall this. After trying everything to fix it, after throttling up on the runway my planes don't respond to tilt & I can't take off or fly. Seeing as flying is the point of the game, its unplayable now.

I find this game a scam, once you save up enough money, to get to the next mission, you buy the plane. And then you get a one time offer of a 70 percent reduced price plane, that costs a lot. A d of course I couldn't afford it and noticed, that you were still able to go into the store to buy the in in game currency. But when I saved for the next mission, I grinded to where I can buy it. But Nope, no offer. But when I didnt save for more coins. The offer popped up. Please stop this, it's a scam

What's the sense of earning "money" in the game when you're still charged real money to "buy" more planes?? This game was fun & exciting till I went to buy another plane only to find out all that "earned" money can't even be used & I STILL gotta pay cold cash. Ruined all my interest in this. Very disappointing. Uninstalling & looking for su'm else.

Upon installation it takes time getting used to controls which is not the issue. All in all it isn't awful. Landing on aircraft carriers takes a handful of attempts to do right b/c the ship is too small and not every plane you fly can stop on a dime. There's also this bizarre glitch where regardless of plane or mission, it freezes up once you select a mission. Freeplay is basically pointless unless all you do is fly around and collect balloons.
Used to love this one but the ads have made it unplayable. There is an ad directly over the throttle, and when an ad plays between screens it can't be closed

I have been playing this app for years now and every other month it seems to inherit new problems including deleting your purchases. Today my plane was flying straight up and the only way to fly it right was to hold my tablet on a angle that was very uncomfortable and aggravating. There is no way to realign the plane to fly level. And good luck lifting off after you land on any airports. You can tell the owner has no plans on putting any money into fixing anything.

Latest update brought the ad banner back in the game - interferes with game play. Not going to play game till gone - this is ridiculous! Won't open game till next update to see if it's gone. I've been playing this game for ten years and the banner ad during game play is poorly thought out - a game killer!

Monetizing the game by putting a banner inside the game play is absolutely ridiculous. Ads between screens or missions I can tolerate but losing screen real estate to an ad during game play is awful!!!!
This (excellent for years) game has been crippled by idiotic ad banners. You can see the altimeter or use the flight controls but you can't do both.
Almost perfect. But, at some point it becomes impossible to play. It asks you to hoard 2.5 million coins or pay $45 to buy a plane for a mission. I am at a dead end.

I loved this game and gave it 5 stars for years and years until I finally purchased a stealth plane package, no stealth fighter dispensed:( then theres no support or way to contact you so drops down to ZERO.
will only let you play 3 levels before you have to spend $8 on the next 3 levels. you have to spend money every few levels
Great downgrade, devs. Now, I have a banner permanently covering one end of my screen. Couldn't earn achievements before. This game sucks. Uninstalled.

this game is a blast but also a joke. they give you a lottery spin to get a chance to win planes that can ONLY be gotten from the lottery. so what do they do? they add planes in the lottery that you already had to purchase in the game to make it that much tougher and very difficult to win the ones you can only get from the lottery. would be nice for once to have a game that is just a straight up decent game without any plots and ploys to take your hard earned money!
Now they've added that permanent advert banner constantly showing on the screen, it makes the game utterly useless; an instant cessation of ever using it again
It is impossible to fly an airplane with a giant banner ad across your screen! You cannot see anything.
Great game. But who's the genius with the last update? You completely covered up the controls with the ad bar. Now I can't play it at all.

Absolutely loved this game,you don't have to spend money if you don't want to, have played all the levels and haven't spent a cent, Edit:the game has become glitchy lately, you are unable to take off after accepting a mission, the phone orientation is fixed and planes are impossible to land. not even be able to do missions. New device and can't take off without standing my phone on one end or the plane runs off to the side.

star_2.text: Used to be a decent game... now it does this strange freeze thing where everything works, the buttons work, the plane moves, I can accept missions, etc., but when I accept a new mission and it's time to take off, the plane won't move!! It keeps flashing for me to turn the brakes ON even though I'm trying to take off. It's a bug that I've never seen until recently, but then again I haven't played this game in a while! Hopefully they get it sorted out because this used to be a fun game!!

VERY disappointed. Used to love this game. Not extremely realistic as a sim, but the graphics are nice, and was a relaxing game. I recently installed it after getting a new phone, and it is GLITCHY. Like others who have already commented, I can verify that when you go into Free Flight mode, land at an airport and accept a mission (at least with certain aircraft), you can't take off after taking a mission. Not happy. There's bugs that need to be fixed. Hopefully devs will correct it.

Made it to level 10 and still playing. I only found 1 bug. On the rescue mission, the timeline doesn't advance after i take off. I have flown over and on top of the plane wreckage, but nothing happens. It still prompts me that i am clear for take off. 3/3/16 *Edit* I re-downloaded the game and began playing again. When i am in free flight mode and land at an airport, I'm not able to take off again. The plane does not respond to the throttle. 12/21/25

game is definitely a nice time killer. One big problem I have with this game is that there is no way to taxi to turn around on the ground to get yourself enough runway to take off when using larger planes. Needs to be fixed, I'm tired of not being able to turn around, not get enough runway, and proceed to kill all 275 souls on board. fix the throttle where half or quarter throttle will still move the plane slowly on the ground or when a mission starts, it spawns you at an end of the runway.

I've been playing this game for way longer than I'd like to admit, but at least I can review this horrible asset flip of a game accurately. I don't know where to start. The game is UGLY, it controls HORRIBLY, quests are repetitive and pointless, and english doesn't seem to be a strong point for this developer. The worst aspect of this game is how damn greedy the developers are, microtransactions are everywhere, it preys on younger audiences. Besides that, it's an alright time waster.

I dont understand how this game got editors choice (not to be rude) but what drugs were you on when making the airport? The runway is like the entire airport and the taxiway is not even big enough for a learjet. Also, I really dont like tilt control. Please consider a joystick, also there is no cockpit cam. There is some good things, like free flight, with a AI plane. And realistic landscaping. Thats it. Please take this review into consideration and maybe I'll give a 4 star rating.

good game ,but the control system of it is annoying.Everytime I'm doing a mission it just doesn't let me lift up or turn properly and it's not just a few times it's all the time, please add more controls

The dive race mission always makes u end in 4th place, and it's impossible to finish in 1st place. (-1) And the plane bouncing and glitching in the fire emergency mission when taking off. The pop-up ads and watching like a million ads just to get 5k coins?? smh. I dont recommend installing this cus ur just gonna uninstall it 30 minutes into playing. Overall, the bugs and glitches and MECHANICS in this game have made me very aggravated.
It is a brilliant game, but sadly, advert banners are right next to the controls, causing interference with game play! Please introduce pay options to remove the ad banners. 🙏

I played the game for 2 hours and I was good at it and I still did not pass to the next level. It doesn't even say how to go to the next level, sure free flying is fun, but 2 hours of it? I thought a certain amount of time of free flying would get me to the next level, but it didn't. Not the best game. Don't waste your time!
Just letting people know: do NOT make purchases in this game. they take the money out of your account but you don't receive anything.

Awesome game but has an issue. When in free-flight mode after landing and picking up passengers or cargo the brakes will not release. Even if you release them and it shows they are released. Please help.

Game itself is pretty good even without the ability to yaw which makes some planes near impossible to fly correctly. The massive downside to this game is how greedy the developer is, if you want to buy most of the planes your looking at paying somewhere between £6 and £45 for one plane, and then on top of that the prices for in game currency are just as ridiculous. I would expect to pay £5 and get at least a set of planes.

To many Bugs to be playable. I'm not able to start again after landing at an airport for missions. Some missions are really stupid, like bringing 270 People to a Aircraft Carrier, where it is impossible to land with such a large plane. Also the Popups sometimes just won't disappear and force you to restart the game. The Prices are ridiculous for a game that hasen't seen any developments in years. All in all not recommended.

This is good game but there are lot of bugs 1. Runway - Runway is tool small for and taxiways are small like A330/ B747 2. airplane likely everytime after the landing brakes are bind and cant move * somtime engines are off in mid air suddenly turn off engines

This game was my best flight simulation game ever! But after some times I began having problem landing and taking off the commercial flights. The airport Alone is weird. Can you imagine an airport been so small and one or two aircraft can't even make their landings on the airport. It's weird! I have downloaded and deleted this game more than 4 times now, but it seems that there are no improvement. Now the worst update is that whenever I land a plane it won't be able to move again It's rubbish😒

The game is easy and fun to play. Simple yet challenging. However, I was overwhelmed by the in-app advertisements. At later levels, when you already become addicted to the game, an advertisement popped up almost everytime before each game starts. You need to watch it for at least 5 seconds before having a chance to skip. This is very annoying.
The planes are too expensive for ₹1050 u will only get a small plane but the gameplay is nice

This game used to be really good, but now they made it so you can only take one flight at a time. Once you land at an airport or carrier, you can't take off again w/o either aborting or closing the app and restarting. You throttle up and the plane just sits there. It used to be great doing rescues, supply runs, or passenger trips. Not any more. Still nice graphics though.

Games are fun, app's are expensive. A game costs maximum £100, with full dlc, limited edition software, the console it runs on costs less than your 4G mobile phone at the moment, you always get a controller with your console, i can't understand why ive repeatedly downloaded this game and uninstalled it, for lack of enjoyment, decided too uninstall it again, edit my 5* review into these 9 lines.

star_3.text: This is a fun game for mobile. Free fly offers plenty of things to do. The problem this game has is memory. It doesn't remember what mission I was on when exit, but worse than that is losing your progress which just happened to me. I don't really want to replay all the missions it took to get all of the aircraft I had in my hanger. ☹️

a really good game. It's super fun, and the missions are engaging. However, during free flight, the Leerjet 55 is not usable. 80% of the time, you can't take off with it. It's also kind of stupid to have missions like deliver 150 people to an aircraft carrier when the larger planes can't land on an aircraft carrier during free flight.

Fun and addictive game! Easy but difficult, has an even amount of rewards and grinding money is fun and decent! Graphics are moderate, but it still shapes out the planes in a good way! My only issue is that a lot of planes, you have to buy them with actual money, even planes that are barely different in states from what you have, and some planes are WAY overpriced in coins. But overall an enjoyable game for when you're bored or you have no internet.

Time killer, but not even close to a simulator. Frequently pushes you to spend money or DL another app. The "dive race" is total BS, the computer planes don't even come close to some of the rings, but if you miss one you have to turn back for it. Frustrating to get mission failed because you aren't in first place, when you clearly see the computer opponents miss multiple rings.

Okay so this review is coming from a real life pilot. My first issue with this game is that the controls are heavily lacking. Sure motion controls are an okay option when you have nothing else, but I would like an option for touchscreen or to use a controller/joystick. Second issue is the flight instruments or rather the lack there of. Only flight speed and altimeter? Give me at least a heading indicator aswell. Also where are the flaps control. Over all this is a very basic sim with not much to offer, and if you want to complete the "story" mode you'd better have a fat wallet. That's all

I wish there was an option to pay to remove the adds. It is horribly interrupting and makes the game almost unbearable. The missions in free flight are unachievable. Everytime you land and select a mission, the game won't let you take off. I tried tapping the landing gear as suggested to get it to go but was only able to get it to work 1 out of 5 times. The flight quality and game play is good otherwise. It is a money grab though, as most planes cost significant money.

Im glad to say that the game isnt nearly as dependent on the "freemium" business model anymore. Ads have been toned down and the game is easily playable for free. Thanks for that. Cons: The "packages" and "coins" are LUDICROUSLY expensive. Im not about to drop US$50 for a plane in a phone app. Sorry. Pros: Fun to play. Free flight mode is addictive.

If there was a premium ad-less version I'd consider. Best planes for each mission are too expensive. Especially since itscloser to arcade style than hard core simulation. But seriously? An ad after almost every click! With no option to remove ads, with no planes worth the time grinding gold and, the price of anything worthwhile; I have changed my rating from 5 to 3 stars.

Pretty entertaining game. Relaxing at the same time. Really helps me wind down at night. The really annoying thing is that it has had the SAME levels for at least 3 or 4 years. You get to a point and it says "levels coming soon" but they never do. I have deleted the game and redownloaded it a number of times to replay it and there are never new levels.

Briefly fun. With poorly designed Aircraft performance and challenges, after a period of weeks playing, at some point it, you find it impossible to accomplish challenges which made me delete this game. If you watch ads you shouldn't have to pay for aircraft or coins. Although it's was fun for awhile, don't get sucked into paying any money for anything. It's designed to get you to pay. Just delete and move on to another sim app.

Great graphics for a phone simulator. However, they push you VERY hard to buy planes, and cash. $69.99 buys you 1 millions coins when planes cost several million. Or, you can spend $30 or more for planes that are generally a one time use. You have the opportunity to use a "lotto wheel" to win money and planes, but I have won one plane four times, and a different plane three times. Should be easier to obtain money instead of playing the free run for 10 hours to make $100k.

The game itself is great. However, while playing, the game will pause automatically every 7 seconds. Also, periodically, the game will freeze up, leave you completely powerless to do anything. I uninstalled it because of said reasons, however, I would reinstall it immediately if these problems were to cease.

Personally I like this kind of game, however I would like to mention possible upgrades. With the larger aircrafts, it's hard to see landing strip, so being able to change to a cabin view would be nice. Being able to see a list of jobs prior to landing on an airport would also be nice. I may be flying the Douglas and want alot of passengers, land on an airport and only 3 passengers need transported. It would be nice to know that info before landing. Over all I enjoy the game.

I was liking it at first; it was fun, worked a lot better than many of the others, and I could do things without paying. Now, it has ads which block me from turning on my landing gear and won't let me start up after landing on an airport. I have to retract the landing gear to crash at the airports so I restart in the air. All in all, it's no longer enjoyable as the game doesn't work.

Old and outdated. Liked the game but some planes are impossible to obtain and the in app purchases are outright insane and not worth it for this tiny game. Aside from that, I still like this game and find it fun. But if you're gonna put planes on sale, stop using as bait to buy in game currency cause as soon as you have enough for it, the discount goes away. Bait and switch

The game is fun, but very greedy app creators. If the ads which are more than an abundance of to annoy you after every mission isn't enough, half the planes you have to buy, some of which are up to $15 -20 and other in app purchases up to $70! Are you serious? Who in their right mind would pay for that? Either make the planes free or cut the dang ads. Quit being greedy!! Jeez!

Some fun challenges and freeroam. But the game isn't really that good. The textures of the island and city are almost non existent. The island itself is very low poly. Only some buildings are 3D, and ya can't crash into them. The big planes are impossible to control. You have a chance of starting in freeroam on an aircraft carrier with a plane twice as big as the aircraft carrier. When crashing a plane, the crash isn't even cool or realistic.

Very good fun game.... Except it only has one map, that gets repetitive.... And after you get all of the airplanes, then what? Well just fly your plane around the map, and make some $$$. But wait, what will you spend that $$$ on? Well, you can't spend it on anything. The graphics and controls are good though. If you decide to download, don't spend real $$$. If you are worried about ads, it does have them. Just turn off the WiFi and cellular data, and no ads appear (Just turn on Airplane mode). ✌

a little disappointed i couldn't use my Bluetooth joystick with this, but i tried it anyway. Over all it feels a lot like Pilot Wings 64 from the N64. Few bugs I'd suggest fixing is that the "watch videos for coins" does not work at all, the planes become uncontrollable as you near vertical, and while i commend you on trying to get altitude and speed indicators, they don't actually match real life at all.

The game is fun however there are some issues that I have, 1. When I land at an airport in free flight and select a mission I am unable to take off again, 2. There needs to be a way to change the view because for me some of the planes are hard to land because you can't see the runway through the planes to get lined up, 3. And there are too many missions that you have to spend money to buy the plane you need to complete because they require to use a special aircraft.

star_4.text: Fun and interactive enough, and able to play offline, which is a huge plus. However, the lack of online gameplay, low number of special achievements, and unfinished levels to be updated on an undetermined date (going on on 3+ years?) really takes a possible 5-star game, down to a gracious 3... and that's only because I still enjoy flying in it every so often. Not great, but

While I enjoy most of the game, I find the "mission area" frustrating when flying the larger passenger aircraft. The smaller aircraft are more nimble and therefore turning is simpler. The larger ones do not turn as well, which is more realistic, and require more area to turn comfortably. What is the purpose of the coins? One cannot use them for in game purchases.

I love this game,very therapeutic. Have played for five years and,literally,hundreds of hours of flight time. But,the game has not grown or progressed in all that time. Planes get glued to the run way now after landing,can't move ,let alone take off again. The most disappointing ? Ads started to block the brakes and landing gear controls buttons,totally ruining many flights. I've spent way more money than I,or anyone should on planes,but seems like developers abandoned or don't care about game

I guess its safe to say I love this game. I've played it quite a bit for quite a while. I have all of the planes that can be bought with the "monopoly money", I've beat all the missions and I'm at the highest level and have never spent a real nickel. My only real complaint is that there are no more levels. It says "Legend" level coming soon but has said that for a long time now. Only 4 stars because of no new levels. More levels please!!!

Honestly pretty solid flying game. You are locked into motion controls though. They're not too bad. It's a pretty fun game with good progression up to a certain level and then you're hit with a grind wall. Youre so far off the money needed to progress even though you collected all the money besides popping balloons for in free flight. There is a cloud save and a few achievements. I got the easy ones.

Fun game! In-app purchases are absurdly expensive, but don't fret. Everything is easily obtainable without spending any real money if you put some time in on free flight mode. I am sitting on over $26M with nothing else to purchase. I'd like to see a "my hanger" filter that shows me only planes I own. I am also anxiously awaiting the Legend tab of missions. Free tip: When you land at an airport, always select "change plane". You'll be set at the beginning of the runway for easy take off regardless of which plan you choose.

Best virtual flight Sim you can get free, graphics are good, you don't need to buy anything, fun scenarios, I cannot really complain. Yes it has ads but that's to be expected in a free mobile game. Most flight simulators your gonna find on Android make you pay extra or buy a subscription for more features. This game has things that only can be bought but it does not make you buy, you can always save up. Everything is attainable even with minimal effort.

It was pretty good. I've had this game since 2020 and I like it. It's pretty fun to play and is offline too. One thing I will suggest is they remove the ONE MILLON FOUR HUNDRED DOLLAR Antonov for the wing walking mission it's wayyyy too expensive for just a mission that gives you a 200,000 coins. Overall I think it's a pretty good game and I would recommend it to a friend. Also there's a bug where you can't fly the glider in free flight bc the mission tab keeps popping up.

I really really like this game, however, I don't like the controls. I'm not a fan of controls that require me to tilt my phone, I like to have a yoke on the screen where I can turn my plane. Secondly, this game needs rudder control. I find it really hard to do sharp turns without it. Lastly, I think that on free mode, we should be able to fly at any altitude we want without the game telling me that it's out of bounds. Also, there should be more planes (757, A340, A380, L1011, etc.) Aside from all this, it's a good game.

The overall gameplay is good if you just want to look around and see some cool things. However it can be a bit buggy with the crashes. They could be improved so that theres actually some terrain damage and as well as part of the plane actually coming off into separate pieces, not just flaps. I think that there should be a daylight cycle, option to turn off your engine when your on the ground, and maybe a sandbox mode where you can adjust the weather (rain, wind, snow, and etc.).

I usually don't rate games but I'll give this one for stars pretty little fun game for free I can play offline as well nice little single player controls are set up pretty easy. only downfall is the better planes cost anywhere between 30 to 50 bucks for the nicer Jets. it would be better if you could buy packages as say lights paint jobs numbers something along the lines of that effect versus buying the actual $50 aircraft. I am not going to spend $50 on an aircraft plane sorry.

This game is pretty good. For one, it's open world. 2, most of levels are pretty easy. 3, realistic gameplay and lots of planes to fly. But the one reason why I give 4 stars instead of 5 is because it's always asking for money. REAL money. Its ridiculous because the game wants 30-60 dollars for a fake video game plane!? Not only that, but all the time its constantly asking crazy prices for planes. Finnaly, I think it would be awesome if they added multiplayer. Noice.

Calm nice game , easy controls , get this app FREE! (Edit) Ok this is me like 5 years later and this is still a fun game, but its not changed. And as a younge person i wasnt able to read the numbers of the real money prices. Bit now that im older and can see how much they cost its insane. Its 40 dollars for a fighter jet! Lower your prices.

Ok flight simulator, not the best but definetely not bad. The physics are a bit weird, but fine. The graphics are okay. But it's pretty much been abandoned by it's creators. I first played this game in 2015 and not much has changed. Same airports same planes, the graphics have changed a little, though. If the creators are reading this, please, please, add new stuff.

Don't get me wrong the game is amazing but it takes forever just to get a single plane I mean all the missions are just the same and they're not that different and it takes forever to get a special mission with the black flame so that you can beat supersonic and it took me over 3 months! If you can fix it to get money faster you'll earn your 5th star other than that it's an amazing game.

Very fun and and great graphics! Good physics engine too. Runs smooth on my Galaxy s4! Prices of planes are expensive though. I recently played this game and tried to unlock a plane and it told me to connect to the internet. I'm clearly connected to 4G but it can't detect my internet. I can't progress with the plane I need for the next level. Samsung Galaxy A20

It's a great game but WARNING: You have TO PAY on order to go to the next part. As in, to get all the other sections, as in, each indicidual section, you have to pay. And it gets more expensive every time, I'm pretty sure I'm not going to check bc, again, that's real money. They're 11 sections. I meant 3 stars btw. Bc I just learned about having to pay for ALL of the 11 Ps: There's one level where there's a lot of a different things to do so that makes up for having to pay for everything else.

A great game that I would otherwise give 5 stars to, but... I'm not alone in feeling that the prices for in app purchases are outrageous and insulting. I knew this was a simple game compared to an expensive simulator and I thoroughly enjoyed it. It was really fun. Yet there are planes available to buy for tens of dollars in a world that takes a couple of minutes to fly across and a strange 25000 foot altitude limit that cancels the mission after 30 seconds.

Im going to give 4 stars. Good: 1. The game is really fun and entertaining, time consuming etc 2. Other plane games ive played, make you fly for hours and hours before you can unlock a plane and then you have to buy it for alot of money, But not this game, most are cheap and easy to unlock. 3. The selection of planes are great, Theres not alot but This is just the amount i like. Bad: 1. 333's landing is bumpy. 2. Dive race is a little 2 hard. 3. I keep crashing into the AI Planes when i land.

The game is super fun but progression is honestly too limited. I'm only on the elite level missions and I now have 15 million of the currency and no way to spend it because I've bought all the planes that can be bought with in-game currency. I reached the highest user level, level 10 senior commander after like 10 hours of gameplay, many levels ago. And it would be more fun if the mission mechanics were implemented into freeplay since it can get repetitive even though I still find it fun.

star_5.text: I haven't played for awhile but when I opened the game, an ad is on top of the throttle so I can't fly. Very disappointed. I have gone through the entire game, I guess 12 to 15 levels, and have yet to purchase a plane. Fly around and enyoy why you downloaded the game in the first place, all while you earn money for your next mission. Most importantly, have fun.

This is a fun game! The missions are varied enough to keep it exciting. Free flight mode lets you earn money for planes required for certain missions. The controls are pretty basic... a little more arcade-style than what I would consider a "simulator", but it didn't detract from the game at all. Also worth mentioning... not a lot of ads. I am looking forward to the "Legend" level (coming soon?)

Runs well and a fun game. I have completed all challenges and am awaiting new missions and content... have maxxed out three times by un-installing and restarting new and at zero each time ... but, looks to be abandoned with the only update I've seen being advertising. On some of the comments, I've gotten ALL of the "free" craft with out spending a dime. And, did it three times. So, yeah, one can get all of those. The other craft that require irl$ aren't needed for any of the available missions..

So, it's mostly really good! It has a wide variety of planes to choose, it's challenging, and that feeling when you land the plane just hits so different! How ever, some missions are a little rage inducing, the map is a little small, and free flight will kick you out if you just want to take a nice, peacfull flight over the sea, but it's still a good game! I would recommend you try it out, it's a good free, easy flight sim!

I've played this game for a few hours now and it's definitely one of the best mobile flight sims I've played. it's got a great selection of aircraft from bush planes to airliners to fighter jets. It also had a large series of missions and a free flight mode (which as optional objectives you can take). Only 3 complaints: premium planes are ridiculously expensive (up to $70), controls in a bank are kinda wonky and in agile craft it's easy to lose control, and you can't adjust control sensitivity.

I really like this game. The controls are simple and fairly easy to master. I do have some suggestions for the developer: a simple cockpit view would be nice, as well as maybe buyable paint jobs for the airplanes. And of course I'd love to see new planes added, and maybe a new island or two to fly around? Overall a pretty solid game, reminds me of an old dogfight PC game I played years ago.

First: When stuck on the runway, retract the landing gear and you'll crash. Then Retry will pop up. Hit that and you'll be on your way again, with passengers and cargo intact. Okay, now that they've reduced the ads to very manageable; what could be done to make this an even cooler app? Perhaps add more planes landing at all the airports, except for the aircraft carriers. And flashing lights for night flights on all the planes, too Great app...but those things would make it even better!

Ex military pilot who loves the attention to detail built into the game. "I've always wondered if that aircraft was as sluggish as it looks?" and "I've always wanted to set a 747 on a carrier!" Lots of fun, easy to play even if you have zero flight experience! How about some upgrades??? Target practice? Air combat? Having fun killing ballons with a Stealth, but... :)

Idk why people are saying that this app is theft about when you buy planes how it doesn't show price or doesn't ask for your consent to purchase it. It quite clearly and blodly shows the, I do admit, ludicrously high price to buy a plane. 20 bucks for just a plane?! WHAT THE HELL?! Not even EA would charge you that much for a single item in game. Other than that, it's fun and easy to play

I really like the game as it is, 5 stars by far. However I think adding a multiplayer feature would make the game even better still, as well as maybe a bigger map and more planes. I am still having problems with the cargo 415 spawning me and instantly thinking I've crashed. It only seems to be a problem with that one plane, so otherwise the game easily deserves 5 stars.

It's a amazing game and detailed aircraft, but I wish it could have more realistic crashes and fuel times, so you have to land to refuel. Also, it only gives you discounts on planes when you never have enough in game cash, then once you actually have a lot of money, it stops giving you discounts. Other than that, terrific game, I recommend it to everyone.

I love this game. It's realistic. I like using the seaplane too. On free mode , I can't always takeoff from the runway when doing missions. The aircraft doesn't always move when I bring the throttle up. That's the problem with the free mode. Hey sometimes, I see another airplane takeoff ,fly, land ,and taxi.I like that. This is a nice game . This is my first time keeping this game. It is so hard to win the dive race in the mission mode.

It's a fun game for free. Lots of missions to complete and keeps me busy when I have no internet. Some of the missions are hard but I completed them all. Limited data usage which is good cause my plan is like $250 a month. Now when I'm on an airplane, i know what to play. Maybe you can add more planes and maybe flaps. But overall good. Everyone that left a bad review just don't want to admit how good this is.

Lot more user friendly than other similar apps ive tried, very easy to use controls and better feel of actually flying the aircraft. You will not be disappointed. Five stars for sure. edit: I changed phones and when I tried to load my app to the new phone from same google account , the flight pilot app started over from scratch, I lost all my planes and jets, I had played the game for so long I had purchased almost every jet fighter and airliners, I will not start over .

I enjoy this game , planes respond with non -complex controls depending on there size and purpose in a easy to learn progression of tasks and levels. Great for a old non-gamer as myself lol. I enjoy the graphics but the runways at the airports are a little bit short and buildings and other airplanes can be run through without consequence. The ads are not constant and you can reach all the levels and required aircraft without spending a dime with contract flying jobs.

the controls are great and easy to master. the only problem is the ads. they are very frequent and badly timed. The rest of the game is awesome. I really like the lottery spinner to where you can win planes that are usually very highly priced but so worth it to buy them.

i have been playing this game since i was a kid. this game needs some serious update. there is no modern games like this exist at all. more improved visual. mission and planes would be soo good. especially if it gets open world. it can be a mini microsoft flight simulator. i would request devs to look after this. as a hard core gamer i got some emotions toward this nostalgic game
All the fun of flying with none of the fuss! An easy sim with lovely scenery.

I have been playing this game since almost 10 years now... huge fan of this and also love the accuracy.. just few things which could be improved: improve the runway system so we can turn and depart for our next flight and make terminals to park planes else the game is wonderful hats off to the developers
awesome and basic game, it would be better if the legend stage was open and if it had more planes, maybe the concorde.
